name: Seq Bass
explanation: A squelchy monophonic acid sequencer-bass synth: one VCO mixing a saw+square core with a square sub-oscillator an octave down for a fuller voice, feeding the famous squelchy 4-pole resonant low-pass driven by a snappy decay envelope. Accent emphasises the filter sweep and level for punchy acid hits, Glide slides the pitch between notes for sliding lines, and high Resonance squelches toward self-oscillation while staying bounded. Monophonic, last-note priority, pure algorithm.
